property.name: java.library.path
property.value:
D:\JAVA in;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java in;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;D:\Program Files
vm;C:
vm4w
odejs;D:
odejs\;C:\ProgramData\chocolatey in;D:\Program Files\Git\cmd;D:\Program Files\cursoresources\app in;C:\Program Files\Pandoc\;C:\Program Files\PuTTY\;%MAVEN_HOME% in;;C:\Program Files\Docker\Dockeresources in;C:\Users\HW\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python312\Scripts\;C:\Users\HW\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python312\;C:\Users\HW\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Launcher\;C:\Users\HW\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;D:\Program Files\Microsoft VS Code in;D:\Program Files
vm;C:
vm4w
odejs;C:\Users\HW\AppData\Roaming
pm;D:\JAVA in;C:\Users\HW\.multica in;D:\Program Files\Antigravity in;D:\maven\apache-maven-3.9.15\bin;C:\Users\HW\.bun in;.

testcase.name: should_CreateTableWithProperties_When_PropertiesMapProvided
